title: The best and the worst
question: 把今天课文里「按不同标准比较」放进学校展示、搭建作品和桌面评比——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: Our class joined a poster competition. Tom's project was larger than mine, but my small project was neat and more interesting.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 学校海报评比：清楚整洁的设计胜出
options.english_template: Our class joined a poster ___. Amy's poster was neat because it was clean and clear.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 搭建作品：大的不一定最有趣
options.english_template: Tom's LEGO house was larger than mine, but my small house was ___.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 自嘲结尾：喜欢整洁，但不喜欢辛苦整理
options.english_template: I like clean desks, but I do not like hard work. I may win a prize for ___ desk.
